final:
module top_shift_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input shift,
    input [3:0] in,
    output reg [3:0] out);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            out <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (shift) begin
            out <= {out[2:0], in[3]};
        end
    end

endmodule
